title: Systems Design, Observability, and AI FinOps
shortSummary: Tie architecture together with capacity planning, tracing, cost controls, and decision-ready operational metrics.
whyItMatters: The senior step-change in frontier AI engineering is architectural judgment. You need to explain tradeoffs, spot weak links, and instrument the system so leaders can make decisions about quality, cost, and scale.
coreConcepts: Architecture tradeoff writing for AI services
Tracing, logging, metrics, and incident visibility
Reliability budgets, rollback readiness, and release risk
Explaining technical health in terms leadership can act on
